title: calligonum × dubianskyi f. muravljanskyi
intro: Calligonum × dubianskyi f. muravljanskyi is a variant of the Calligonum dubianskyi plant, a type of shrub that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calligonum × dubianskyi f. muravljanskyi include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting against infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in the production of various traditional medicines in certain regions.
